title: Fig. 2 in First case of Trichinella spiralis infection in beavers (Castor fiber) in Poland and Europe
author: Różycki, Mirosław
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Fig. 2. Electrophoretic profiles of Trichinella spp. larva amplicons after multiplex PCR amplification. Lanes 1 and 8 marker (Generuler 100 bp DNA), 2–6 (T. britovi), 7 - T. spiralis from beaver (sample 754), lanes 9–12 controls (9 - T. papaue, 10 - T. pseudospiralis, 11 - T. spiralis, 12 - negative control).
